---
title: "Gonzalo Llamosas"
subtitle: "Assistant Professor in Public Finance · University of Málaga"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 16em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gonzalo-llamosas-garcia/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/lgg18106
    - text: "Scholar"
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=O8gTD4AAAAAJ&hl=en
    - text: "ORCID"
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4407-2845
    - text: "ResearchGate"
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gonzalo-Llamosas-Garcia-2
---

I am Assistant Professor in Public Finance at the [University of Málaga](https://www.uma.es), accredited by ANECA as Associate Professor.

My research sits at the intersection of **fiscal policy**, **behavioural economics** and **data**, with growing attention to how artificial intelligence is reshaping the tax base of advanced economies.

I currently work on the effects of fiscal consolidation on public debt sustainability in the EU-27, on the design of financial-education policies, and on how human decisions interact with fiscal-policy outcomes. My recent work has appeared in the *Journal of Behavioral and Experimental Economics* (2025) and *Global Policy* (2020).

Outside academia, I host [**Outlook Project**](outlook-project.qmd), a YouTube channel on economics, data and human decisions.
